DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB_MATERIAL]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB_MATERIAL]
( 
	[JobMaterialID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[MaterialID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Quantity] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[Cost] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[Price] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[EstimatedQuantity] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[EstimatedCost] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[OverrideFlag] [bit]  NULL,
	[InvoiceDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[InvoiceNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BatchFlag] [bit]  NULL,
	[BatchNumber] [int]  NULL,
	[BatchDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[Comments] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[EnteredOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EnteredBy] [int]  NULL,
	[UpdatedOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[UpdatedBy] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobMaterialID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_MaterialID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [JobMaterialID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
